lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Hello [player name], do you need any assistance?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please. I need healing.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Sure, how many hitpoints would you like me to heal?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 4 Hitpoints.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That will cost you 1 opal.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: You don't have a opal to pay me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoops, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On second thoughts, no thanks.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Ok, suit yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 5 Hitpoints.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That will cost you 1 sapphire or 1 piece of jade.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: You don't have a sapphire or a piece of jade with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoops, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 7 Hitpoints.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That will cost you 1 emerald or 1 red topaz.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: You don't have an emerald or a red topaz to pay me with!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoops, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 9 Hitpoints.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That will cost you 1 diamond.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: You don't have a diamond to pay me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoops, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: 11 Hitpoints.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: That will cost you 1 ruby.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All right.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: You don't have a ruby to pay me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whoops, sorry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. Just looking around.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Ok. If you want to know anything, just ask.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do around here?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Oh, I'm the resident healer. My name is Nuff, Fairy Nuff. Who are you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: My name is [player name].

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Pleased to meet you, [player name]. As I was saying, I'm the healer in Zanaris. I graduated over 200 human years ago. Look, there's my Advanced Healing Certificate on the wall. I never go anywhere without it.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: It's my job to look after the sick, wounded or dying fairies around here. Of course, fairies being magical by nature, not many of them get hurt, so I don't normally have much to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What about healing humans? Lots of adventurers must get hurt fighting the Otherworldly beings.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Yes they do. Silly isn't it? I do use my healing magic on humans sometimes, but I don't like them attacking our other guests, so I charge them for the service.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How much do you charge to heal someone, then?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Well, the gold that you humans are so fond of has no real value in Zanaris, so I ask my patients to pay me in gems.

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: I will heal 4 hitpoints for an opal, 5 hitpoints for either a sapphire or a piece of jade, 7 hitpoints for an emerald or red topaz, 9 for a ruby and 11 for a diamond.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Only 11 hitpoints for a diamond? Doesn't that seem a bit steep?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Maybe to you, but you'd be surprised how many adventurer's are willing to pay those prices.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How is the Fairy Queen doing?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: Not too well; the Godfather hasn't given me those secateurs yet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why aren't you in the war room with the Fairy Queen and her advisors?

lines.speaker: Fairy Nuff
lines.text: I don't like war! I don't believe that violence is ever justified, that's why I became a healer.
